name: car-deals-aggregator-mcp
description: Aggregate used and new car listings across Cars.com, Autotrader, KBB, CarMax, and Carvana. Flexible filters — only zip is required; make, model, free-text keyword, price, year, mileage, deal rating, and CarFax history (1-Owner, No Accidents, Personal Use) are all optional. Uses direct JSON/GraphQL APIs with Puppeteer fallback.

tools.name: search_car_deals
tools.description: Search car listings by zip (required) plus any optional filters: make, model, free-text keyword, price, year range, mileage, deal rating, condition (new/used), and CarFax history (1-Owner, No Accidents, Personal Use).
